message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
You are working on beads issue flt-it8.27: "MCP feature/docs alignment" (P1 bug).

## Issue Details
Project docs and README present MCP as an available capability, but the /mcp endpoint is still a placeholder that returns 501. Align externally stated capabilities with the actual implementation, and prevent placeholder endpoints from being represented as delivered features.

## WORKTREE SETUP вҖ” RUN FIRST
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/mcp-align"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"
if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"; else git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"; fi
cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
echo "CWD: $(pwd)" && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.

## Instructions
1. Read CLAUDE.md, api/CLAUDE.md, and README.md
2. Find the /mcp endpoint implementation (likely in api/internal/router/ or api/internal/mcp/)
3. Determine what MCP actually implements vs what docs claim
4. Two valid approaches:
   a. If MCP code exists but isn't wired up properly вҖ” wire it up and update docs to match reality
   b. If MCP is truly a placeholder вҖ” update docs to mark it as "planned" / remove false claims
5. Check README, CLAUDE.md, product-overview.md for MCP references
6. Ensure docs accurately reflect the actual state of MCP support

## Quality Gate
```bash
make api-test-unit && make api-lint
```

## Completion
When done, commit, push branch, and report back with summary and quality gate results.
</teammate-message>

1вҶ’# Flotsam
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Personal knowledge management system вҖ” a "second brain" for capturing thoughts,
     4вҶ’notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’## What it does
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’- **Capture**: Save bookmarks (Chrome extension), voice notes (Android app),
     9вҶ’  text notes, and files with minimal friction
    10вҶ’- **Search**: Full-text and semantic (vector) search across everything you've saved
    11вҶ’- **AI integration**: MCP server lets AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) access
    12вҶ’  your personal knowledge base with defense-in-depth authorization
    13вҶ’- **Self-hosted**: You own your data end-to-end, deployed on your VPS
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’## Architecture
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’```
    18вҶ’Clients (Chrome Extension, Android App, Web App, AI Tools via MCP)
    19вҶ’  в”Ӯ
    20вҶ’  в–ј
    21вҶ’Go API Server (GraphQL + REST upload + MCP)
    22вҶ’  в”Ӯ
    23вҶ’  в”ңв”Җв”Җ PostgreSQL + pgvector (metadata, embeddings, FTS, jobs)
    24вҶ’  в””в”Җв”Җ S3-Compatible Storage (page HTML, audio files, documents)
    25вҶ’```
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’See [docs/specs/product-overview.md](docs/specs/product-overview.md) for the
    28вҶ’full architecture document.
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’## Quick start
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’```bash
    33вҶ’# Prerequisites: Go 1.24+, Node.js 22+, pnpm 9+, Docker
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’cp .env.example .env          # Edit with your settings
    36вҶ’make dev                      # Start everything (DB + API + web)
    37вҶ’```
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’| Service | URL |
    40вҶ’|---------|-----|
    41вҶ’| Web app | http://localhost:8080 |
    42вҶ’| API | http://localhost:8081 |
    43вҶ’| GraphQL Playground | http://localhost:8081/playground |
    44вҶ’| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 |
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’## Development
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’```bash
    49вҶ’make help                     # List all available targets
    50вҶ’make dev-db-up                # Start dev database only
    51вҶ’make api-build                # Build API binary
    52вҶ’make api-test                 # Run Go tests
    53вҶ’make web-install              # Install frontend dependencies
    54вҶ’make web-dev                  # Start frontend dev server
    55вҶ’make test-quick               # Fast checks (no DB required)
    56вҶ’make test-standard            # Full local validation
    57вҶ’```
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’## Project structure
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’```
    62вҶ’flotsam/
    63вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ api/                     # Go API server
    64вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ cmd/server/          # Entrypoint
    65вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ internal/            # Business logic packages
    66вҶ’в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ graph/               # GraphQL (gqlgen)
    67вҶ’в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ migrations/          # SQL migrations (goose)
    68вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ web/                     # React/TypeScript frontend
    69вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ extension/               # Chrome extension (Manifest V3)
    70вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ mobile/                  # Android app
    71вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ compose/                 # Docker Compose files
    72вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ docs/specs/              # Product & architecture specs
    73вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ scripts/                 # Shell utilities
    74вҶ’```
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’## Tech stack
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’| Component | Technology |
    79вҶ’|-----------|-----------|
    80вҶ’| API | Go + chi/v5 |
    81вҶ’| GraphQL | gqlgen (schema-first) |
    82вҶ’| Database | PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector |
    83вҶ’| Background jobs | River (PG-backed) |
    84вҶ’| Object storage | S3-compatible (MinIO dev / R2 prod) |
    85вҶ’| Frontend | React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Mantine 7 |
    86вҶ’| GraphQL client | urql + gql.tada |
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’## Issue tracking
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’This project uses [beads](https://github.com/bead-code/beads) for issue tracking:
    91вҶ’
    92вҶ’```bash
    93вҶ’bd list          # All open issues
    94вҶ’bd ready         # Unblocked issues ready to work
    95вҶ’bd show <id>     # Issue details
    96вҶ’```
    97вҶ’

1вҶ’# Flotsam: Architecture Design & Product Overview
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## 1. Context & Vision
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’**Flotsam** is a personal knowledge management system вҖ” a "second brain" for capturing thoughts, notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’**Core problems it solves:**
     8вҶ’- **Capture friction**: Too many clicks to save a thought, especially on mobile/while driving
     9вҶ’- **Retrieval**: Information is scattered across Google Drive, browser bookmarks, various apps вҖ” can't find things semantically
    10вҶ’- **AI integration**: AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) can't access personal knowledge
    11вҶ’- **Data fragmentation**: No unified place for all types of personal information
    12вҶ’- **Data control**: User owns the data end-to-end, self-hosted on VPS
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’**MVP scope**: Browser bookmarks (Chrome extension) + voice notes (Android phone app with voice trigger for driving)
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’**Full vision** (post-MVP): Web app with query interface, Google Drive integration, iOS app, Firefox/Safari extensions, MCP with defense-in-depth authorization, content-level access control, multi-user support.
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’**Inspiration**: Nate B. Jones' "Open Brain" (Supabase + Slack + MCP), Obsidian (graph view, backlinks, hierarchical tags, daily notes), Readwise (capture + highlights).
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’---
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’## 2. Architecture Overview
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’```
    25вҶ’                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    26вҶ’                    в”Ӯ                  Clients                     в”Ӯ
    27вҶ’                    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
    28вҶ’                    в”Ӯ Chrome   в”Ӯ Android  в”Ӯ Web App  в”Ӯ AI Tools   в”Ӯ
    29вҶ’                    в”ӮExtension в”Ӯ   App    в”Ӯ (React)  в”Ӯ(via MCP)   в”Ӯ
    30вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    31вҶ’                         в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ

    43вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ӮCRUD  в”Ӯ в”ӮEngineв”Ӯ в”Ӯ/RBAC в”Ӯ в”ӮAuthZ  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ

    54вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ     Background Job Processor            в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ

    56вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
    57вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    58вҶ’                           в”Ӯ                          в”Ӯ
    59вҶ’                    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ            в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    60вҶ’                    в”Ӯ PostgreSQL  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ S3-Compatibleв”Ӯ
    61вҶ’                    в”Ӯ + pgvector  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ   Storage    в”Ӯ
    62вҶ’                    в”Ӯ (metadata,  в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ (page HTML,  в”Ӯ
    63вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  embeddings,в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  audio files,в”Ӯ
    64вҶ’                    в”Ӯ  FTS, jobs) в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ  documents)  в”Ӯ
    65вҶ’                    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ            в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    66вҶ’```
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’---
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’## 3. Data Model
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’### Core table: `items`
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’Everything is an "item" вҖ” a unified type with JSONB metadata for type-specific fields.
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’```sql
    77вҶ’CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;
    78вҶ’CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’CREATE TYPE item_type AS ENUM (
    81вҶ’  'bookmark', 'voice_note', 'text_note', 'drive_doc', 'highlight', 'file'
    82вҶ’);
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’CREATE TYPE item_status AS ENUM (
    85вҶ’  'pending',      -- just captured, processing not complete
    86вҶ’  'processing',   -- async processing in progress
    87вҶ’  'ready',        -- fully processed, searchable
    88вҶ’  'error'         -- processing failed
    89вҶ’);
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’CREATE TYPE sensitivity_level AS ENUM (
    92вҶ’  'public',       -- shareable, external APIs ok
    93вҶ’  'normal',       -- default, external APIs ok
    94вҶ’  'sensitive',    -- use local models, restricted MCP access
    95вҶ’  'private'       -- local models only, no MCP access
    96вҶ’);
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’CREATE TABLE items (
    99вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   100вҶ’  owner_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   101вҶ’  type          item_type NOT NULL,
   102вҶ’  status        item_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   103вҶ’  sensitivity   sensitivity_level NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
   104вҶ’
   105вҶ’  -- Content
   106вҶ’  title         TEXT,
   107вҶ’  content_text  TEXT,                    -- searchable text (page extract, transcription, note body)
   108вҶ’  content_url   TEXT,                    -- S3 key for large content (HTML, audio, images)
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’  -- Search
   111вҶ’  embedding     vector(1536),            -- semantic search vector
   112вҶ’  search_vector tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS (
   113вҶ’    setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(title, '')), 'A') ||
   114вҶ’    setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(content_text, '')), 'B')
   115вҶ’  ) STORED,
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’  -- Organization
   118вҶ’  tags          TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',     -- hierarchical tags: 'project/flotsam', 'person/sarah'
   119вҶ’  metadata      JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- type-specific fields
   120вҶ’  auto_metadata JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- LLM-extracted classification
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’  -- Provenance
   123вҶ’  source        TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'chrome_extension', 'android_app', 'web_app', 'mcp', 'api'
   124вҶ’  source_url    TEXT,                    -- original URL for bookmarks, referrer, etc.
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’  -- Timestamps
   127вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   128вҶ’  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   129вҶ’  captured_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()  -- when user actually captured (may differ from created_at)
   130вҶ’);
   131вҶ’
   132вҶ’-- Indexes
   133вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_owner ON items(owner_id);
   134вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_type ON items(owner_id, type);
   135вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_created ON items(owner_id, created_at DESC);
   136вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_tags ON items USING GIN(tags);
   137вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_metadata ON items USING GIN(metadata);
   138вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_search ON items USING GIN(search_vector);
   139вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_embedding ON items USING ivfflat(embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 100);
   140вҶ’CREATE INDEX idx_items_sensitivity ON items(owner_id, sensitivity);
   141вҶ’```
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’### Type-specific metadata examples
   144вҶ’
   145вҶ’**Bookmark** (`metadata`):
   146вҶ’```json
   147вҶ’{
   148вҶ’  "url": "https://example.com/article",
   149вҶ’  "referrer": "https://news.ycombinator.com",
   150вҶ’  "selection": "The key insight is that...",
   151вҶ’  "page_title": "Article Title",
   152вҶ’  "favicon_url": "https://example.com/favicon.ico",
   153вҶ’  "content_type": "article"
   154вҶ’}
   155вҶ’```
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’**Voice note** (`metadata`):
   158вҶ’```json
   159вҶ’{
   160вҶ’  "duration_seconds": 45,
   161вҶ’  "audio_format": "webm",
   162вҶ’  "transcription_provider": "whisper-local",
   163вҶ’  "device": "Pixel 8",
   164вҶ’  "language": "en"
   165вҶ’}
   166вҶ’```
   167вҶ’
   168вҶ’**Auto-extracted metadata** (`auto_metadata`):
   169вҶ’```json
   170вҶ’{
   171вҶ’  "category": "career",
   172вҶ’  "people": ["Sarah"],
   173вҶ’  "action_items": ["Follow up with Sarah about consulting"],
   174вҶ’  "sentiment": "neutral",
   175вҶ’  "topics": ["career-change", "consulting"],
   176вҶ’  "sensitivity_suggestion": "normal"
   177вҶ’}
   178вҶ’```
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’### Users table
   181вҶ’
   182вҶ’```sql
   183вҶ’CREATE TABLE users (
   184вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   185вҶ’  email         TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
   186вҶ’  display_name  TEXT,
   187вҶ’  password_hash TEXT,                    -- bcrypt, nullable if using external auth
   188вҶ’  auth_provider TEXT DEFAULT 'local',    -- 'local', 'google', 'github'
   189вҶ’  auth_subject  TEXT,                    -- external provider subject ID
   190вҶ’  settings      JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
   191вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
   192вҶ’  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   193вҶ’);
   194вҶ’```
   195вҶ’
   196вҶ’### MCP client registry
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’```sql
   199вҶ’CREATE TABLE mcp_clients (
   200вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   201вҶ’  owner_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   202вҶ’  name          TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'Claude Desktop', 'Cursor', 'ChatGPT'
   203вҶ’  api_key_hash  TEXT NOT NULL,           -- bcrypt hash of client API key
   204вҶ’  permissions   JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',  -- allowed tools, sensitivity levels
   205вҶ’  -- e.g.: {"tools": ["search", "browse", "capture"], "max_sensitivity": "normal"}
   206вҶ’  requires_approval TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', -- operations requiring human approval
   207вҶ’  -- e.g.: ["delete", "update_sensitivity", "export"]
   208вҶ’  active        BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
   209вҶ’  last_used_at  TIMESTAMPTZ,
   210вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   211вҶ’);
   212вҶ’```
   213вҶ’
   214вҶ’### Audit log (for MCP accountability)
   215вҶ’
   216вҶ’```sql
   217вҶ’CREATE TABLE audit_log (
   218вҶ’  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   219вҶ’  user_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
   220вҶ’  client_id     UUID REFERENCES mcp_clients(id),
   221вҶ’  action        TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'search', 'read', 'create', 'update', 'delete'
   222вҶ’  resource_type TEXT,                    -- 'item', 'user', 'mcp_client'
   223вҶ’  resource_id   UUID,
   224вҶ’  request       JSONB,                   -- sanitized request details
   225вҶ’  response_summary JSONB,               -- summary of what was returned/changed
   226вҶ’  approved      BOOLEAN,                -- null if no approval needed, true/false otherwise
   227вҶ’  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
   228вҶ’);
   229вҶ’```
   230вҶ’
   231вҶ’---
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’## 4. API Design
   234вҶ’
   235вҶ’### GraphQL Schema (core types)
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’```graphql
   238вҶ’type Item {
   239вҶ’  id: ID!
   240вҶ’  type: ItemType!
   241вҶ’  status: ItemStatus!
   242вҶ’  sensitivity: SensitivityLevel!
   243вҶ’  title: String
   244вҶ’  contentText: String
   245вҶ’  contentUrl: String
   246вҶ’  tags: [String!]!
   247вҶ’  metadata: JSON!
   248вҶ’  autoMetadata: JSON!
   249вҶ’  source: String!
   250вҶ’  sourceUrl: String
   251вҶ’  createdAt: DateTime!
   252вҶ’  updatedAt: DateTime!
   253вҶ’  capturedAt: DateTime!
   254вҶ’}
   255вҶ’
   256вҶ’enum ItemType { BOOKMARK, VOICE_NOTE, TEXT_NOTE, DRIVE_DOC, HIGHLIGHT, FILE }
   257вҶ’enum ItemStatus { PENDING, PROCESSING, READY, ERROR }
   258вҶ’enum SensitivityLevel { PUBLIC, NORMAL, SENSITIVE, PRIVATE }
   259вҶ’
   260вҶ’type SearchResult {
   261вҶ’  items: [Item!]!
   262вҶ’  total: Int!
   263вҶ’  hasMore: Boolean!
   264вҶ’}
   265вҶ’
   266вҶ’type Query {
   267вҶ’  item(id: ID!): Item
   268вҶ’  items(filter: ItemFilter, limit: Int, offset: Int, sort: ItemSort): SearchResult!
   269вҶ’  search(query: String!, filter: ItemFilter, limit: Int, threshold: Float): SearchResult!
   270вҶ’  me: User!
   271вҶ’}
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’type Mutation {
   274вҶ’  captureBookmark(input: BookmarkInput!): Item!
   275вҶ’  captureNote(input: NoteInput!): Item!
   276вҶ’  updateItem(id: ID!, input: UpdateItemInput!): Item!
   277вҶ’  deleteItem(id: ID!): Boolean!
   278вҶ’  updateSensitivity(id: ID!, sensitivity: SensitivityLevel!): Item!
   279вҶ’  tagItem(id: ID!, tags: [String!]!): Item!
   280вҶ’}
   281вҶ’
   282вҶ’input BookmarkInput {
   283вҶ’  url: String!
   284вҶ’  title: String
   285вҶ’  selection: String
   286вҶ’  referrer: String
   287вҶ’  tags: [String!]
   288вҶ’  sensitivity: SensitivityLevel
   289вҶ’}
   290вҶ’
   291вҶ’input ItemFilter {
   292вҶ’  types: [ItemType!]
   293вҶ’  tags: [String!]
   294вҶ’  sensitivity: [SensitivityLevel!]
   295вҶ’  source: String
   296вҶ’  dateFrom: DateTime
   297вҶ’  dateTo: DateTime
   298вҶ’  status: [ItemStatus!]
   299вҶ’}
   300вҶ’```
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’### REST Endpoints
   303вҶ’
   304вҶ’| Method | Path | Purpose |
   305вҶ’|--------|------|---------|
   306вҶ’| POST | `/upload` | Multipart file upload (audio, images) вҶ’ returns S3 URL |
   307вҶ’| GET | `/health` | Health check + version |
   308вҶ’| * | `/graphql` | GraphQL endpoint |
   309вҶ’| GET | `/playground` | GraphQL Playground (dev only) |
   310вҶ’| * | `/mcp` | MCP streamable HTTP |
   311вҶ’
   312вҶ’---
   313вҶ’
   314вҶ’## 5. Auth & Authorization Architecture
   315вҶ’
   316вҶ’### Authentication flow
   317вҶ’
   318вҶ’1. **Web app**: Email/password login вҶ’ JWT (access + refresh tokens)
   319вҶ’2. **Chrome extension**: User logs in via web app, extension gets token via `chrome.identity` or manual paste
   320вҶ’3. **Android app**: Email/password вҶ’ JWT
   321вҶ’4. **MCP clients**: Per-client API keys (registered in web UI)
   322вҶ’5. **API direct**: Bearer JWT or API key
   323вҶ’
   324вҶ’### JWT claims
   325вҶ’
   326вҶ’```go
   327вҶ’type Claims struct {
   328вҶ’    jwt.RegisteredClaims
   329вҶ’    UserID     uuid.UUID `json:"uid"`
   330вҶ’    Email      string    `json:"email"`
   331вҶ’    ClientType string    `json:"ctype"` // "web", "extension", "mobile", "api"
   332вҶ’}
   333вҶ’```
   334вҶ’
   335вҶ’### Authorization model
   336вҶ’
   337вҶ’Multi-tenant from day 1:
   338вҶ’- Every item has `owner_id`
   339вҶ’- All queries filter by authenticated user's ID
   340вҶ’- Row-level security in PostgreSQL as defense-in-depth
   341вҶ’- RBAC columns in users table for future multi-user scenarios
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’---
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’## 6. MCP Authorization Model
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’Defense-in-depth with three layers:
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’### Layer 1: Per-client tool permissions
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’Each MCP client has an allowlist of tools and maximum sensitivity level:
   352вҶ’```json
   353вҶ’{
   354вҶ’  "tools": ["search", "browse", "capture"],
   355вҶ’  "max_sensitivity": "normal",
   356вҶ’  "read_only": false
   357вҶ’}
   358вҶ’```
   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’### Layer 2: Human-in-the-loop approval
   361вҶ’
   362вҶ’Certain operations require real-time user approval:
   363вҶ’- Configured per-client in `requires_approval` array
   364вҶ’- When triggered: request is held, push notification sent to user's device
   365вҶ’- User approves/denies via web app or mobile app
   366вҶ’- Timeout after configurable period (default: 5 minutes) вҶ’ deny
   367вҶ’
   368вҶ’### Layer 3: Content-level filtering
   369вҶ’
   370вҶ’- Items with `sensitivity = 'private'` are never returned via MCP
   371вҶ’- Items with `sensitivity = 'sensitive'` only returned to clients with `max_sensitivity >= 'sensitive'`
   372вҶ’- Auto-classification suggests sensitivity on capture; user can override
   373вҶ’- Audit log records every MCP access for accountability
   374вҶ’
   375вҶ’---
   376вҶ’
   377вҶ’## 7. Content Processing Pipeline
   378вҶ’
   379вҶ’### Sync operations (block API response)
   380вҶ’- Text embedding generation (< 1s for short content)
   381вҶ’- Tag extraction from metadata
   382вҶ’- Input validation
   383вҶ’
   384вҶ’### Async operations (background jobs)
   385вҶ’- Page content fetching for bookmarks (fetch URL, extract readable content)
   386вҶ’- Audio transcription (Whisper API or local)
   387вҶ’- Auto-metadata extraction (LLM classification)
   388вҶ’- Sensitivity auto-classification
   389вҶ’- Large content upload to S3
   390вҶ’- Re-embedding after content changes
   391вҶ’
   392вҶ’### Job processing
   393вҶ’
   394вҶ’PostgreSQL-backed job queue (River):
   395вҶ’- Jobs stored in PG (no new infrastructure)
   396вҶ’- Retries with exponential backoff
   397вҶ’- Dead letter queue for failed jobs
   398вҶ’- Status tracking (items move from `pending` вҶ’ `processing` вҶ’ `ready` / `error`)
   399вҶ’
   400вҶ’---
   401вҶ’
   402вҶ’## 8. Storage Architecture
   403вҶ’
   404вҶ’### PostgreSQL (structured data + search)
   405вҶ’- Item metadata, user data, MCP client registry, audit log
   406вҶ’- pgvector embeddings for semantic search
   407вҶ’- Full-text search indexes
   408вҶ’- Background job queue (River)
   409вҶ’- Managed via goose migrations
   410вҶ’
   411вҶ’### S3-Compatible Object Storage (large content)
   412вҶ’- Development: MinIO in Docker
   413вҶ’- Production: Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible, no egress fees)
   414вҶ’- Stores: page HTML/content, audio files, images, document snapshots
   415вҶ’- Items reference S3 objects via `content_url` column
   416вҶ’
   417вҶ’### Key hierarchy
   418вҶ’```
   419вҶ’s3://flotsam-{env}/
   420вҶ’  {owner_id}/
   421вҶ’    bookmarks/{item_id}/content.html
   422вҶ’    voice_notes/{item_id}/audio.webm
   423вҶ’    voice_notes/{item_id}/audio.mp3
   424вҶ’    files/{item_id}/{filename}
   425вҶ’```
   426вҶ’
   427вҶ’---
   428вҶ’
   429вҶ’## 9. Provider Abstraction
   430вҶ’
   431вҶ’Pluggable interfaces for AI services, with local fallback for sensitive content:
   432вҶ’
   433вҶ’```go
   434вҶ’type EmbeddingProvider interface {
   435вҶ’    Embed(ctx context.Context, text string) ([]float32, error)
   436вҶ’    EmbedBatch(ctx context.Context, texts []string) ([][]float32, error)
   437вҶ’    Dimensions() int
   438вҶ’}
   439вҶ’
   440вҶ’type TranscriptionProvider interface {
   441вҶ’    Transcribe(ctx context.Context, audio io.Reader, opts TranscribeOpts) (string, error)
   442вҶ’}
   443вҶ’
   444вҶ’type ClassificationProvider interface {
   445вҶ’    Classify(ctx context.Context, content string) (*Classification, error)
   446вҶ’}
   447вҶ’```
   448вҶ’
   449вҶ’**Implementations:**
   450вҶ’| Provider | Embedding | Transcription | Classification |
   451вҶ’|----------|-----------|---------------|----------------|
   452вҶ’| OpenAI | text-embedding-3-small (1536d) | Whisper API | gpt-4o-mini |
   453вҶ’| Local | nomic-embed-text via Ollama | whisper.cpp | llama via Ollama |
   454вҶ’
   455вҶ’**Routing logic**: If item sensitivity >= `sensitive`, use local providers. Otherwise, use configured default (OpenAI).
   456вҶ’
   457вҶ’---
   458вҶ’
   459вҶ’## 10. Ideas Stolen from Obsidian
   460вҶ’
   461вҶ’- **Hierarchical tags**: `project/flotsam`, `person/sarah`, `topic/career` вҖ” not flat tags
   462вҶ’- **Backlinks**: When a bookmark references another captured URL, create a link. Surface "what links to this" in the UI.
   463вҶ’- **Daily digest**: Auto-generated summary of items captured each day
   464вҶ’- **Graph view** (future): Visualize connections between items based on shared tags, backlinks, semantic similarity
   465вҶ’- **Quick capture**: Obsidian's "quick add" pattern вҖ” minimal friction to save a thought
   466вҶ’

   468вҶ’
   469вҶ’## 11. Technology Choices
   470вҶ’
   471вҶ’### Core
   472вҶ’| Component | Technology | Why |
   473вҶ’|-----------|-----------|-----|
   474вҶ’| API framework | Go + chi/v5 | Composable middleware, stdlib-compatible |
   475вҶ’| GraphQL | gqlgen (schema-first) | Type-safe codegen, SDL source of truth |
   476вҶ’| Database driver | pgx/v5 + pgxpool | Native PostgreSQL, connection pooling |
   477вҶ’| Migrations | goose/v3 (embedded) | SQL-based, up/down, embedded in binary |
   478вҶ’| JWT | golang-jwt/v5 | HS256 + RS256 support |
   479вҶ’| Config | caarlos0/env | Struct-tag env var binding |
   480вҶ’| Logging | log/slog (stdlib) | Structured, leveled |
   481вҶ’| MCP | modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk | Official Go MCP SDK |
   482вҶ’| Background jobs | River (riverqueue/river) | PG-backed, Go-native, integrates with pgx |
   483вҶ’| S3 client | aws-sdk-go-v2 | S3-compatible API (works with R2, MinIO) |
   484вҶ’| Password hashing | golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt | Standard library |
   485вҶ’| HTTP client (page fetch) | go-readability | Extract readable content from HTML |
   486вҶ’| Vector search | pgvector (via pgx) | No additional infrastructure |

   508вҶ’|-----------|-----------|
   509вҶ’| Framework | TBD (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose vs React Native vs Flutter) |
   510вҶ’| Voice | Android SpeechRecognizer or Google Speech API |
   511вҶ’| Trigger | "Hey Google" routine, notification quick-action, or widget |
   512вҶ’

1вҶ’# Flotsam вҖ” Claude Instructions
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Personal knowledge management system: a monorepo with a Go API (`api/`) and a
     4вҶ’React/TypeScript frontend (`web/`). Component-specific deep-dives are in the
     5вҶ’`@import` files below.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’---
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’## Prerequisites
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’- **Go** 1.24+
    12вҶ’- **Node.js** 22+ with **pnpm** 9+ (`npm install -g pnpm`)
    13вҶ’- **Docker** (for `make dev` вҖ” runs PostgreSQL + pgvector + MinIO in containers)
    14вҶ’- **PostgreSQL** 16+ with pgvector (only if managing DB manually instead of `make dev`)
    15вҶ’- **golangci-lint** (optional): see golangci-lint docs
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’---
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’## Environment setup
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’```bash
    22вҶ’cp .env.example .env   # fill in DATABASE_URL and JWT_SECRET at minimum
    23вҶ’```
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’Required: `DATABASE_URL` вҖ” the API refuses to start without it.
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’Ports:
    28вҶ’- **API**: `:8081`
    29вҶ’- **Web dev server**: `:8080` вҖ” proxies `/graphql`, `/api`, and `/mcp` вҶ’ `localhost:8081`
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’---
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’## Commands (Root Makefile)
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’| Command | Action |
    36вҶ’|---|---|
    37вҶ’| `make dev` | Full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) вҖ” single command |
    38вҶ’| `make dev-db-up` | Start dev database only (PG 16 + pgvector on port 5433) |
    39вҶ’| `make dev-db-down` | Stop dev database |
    40вҶ’| `make api-build` | Compile `bin/flotsam-api` |
    41вҶ’| `make api-run` | Run API server |
    42вҶ’| `make api-generate` | Regenerate gqlgen code |
    43вҶ’| `make api-test` | All Go tests (race detector) |
    44вҶ’| `make api-test-unit` | Unit tests only (`-short`) |
    45вҶ’| `make lint` | Run all linters (Go + web) |
    46вҶ’| `make api-lint` | go vet + golangci-lint (includes gosec) |
    47вҶ’| `make api-migrate-up` | Apply pending migrations |
    48вҶ’| `make api-migrate-down` | Roll back last migration |
    49вҶ’| `make web-install` | `pnpm install` |
    50вҶ’| `make web-dev` | Vite dev server (port 8080) |
    51вҶ’| `make web-build` | TypeScript check + production build |
    52вҶ’| `make web-lint` | ESLint (zero-warning mode) |
    53вҶ’| `make web-test` | Vitest unit tests |
    54вҶ’| `make web-schema-sync` | Regenerate `web/schema.graphql` + `graphql-env.d.ts` from API SDL |
    55вҶ’| `make test-quick` | Fast checks: Go unit tests + TS build + ESLint (~10-20s, no DB) |
    56вҶ’| `make test-standard` | Full local: quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB) |
    57вҶ’| `make test-full` | Complete: standard + integration + e2e (requires DB + services) |
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’---
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’## Testing standards
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’### Test tiers
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’| Tier | Command | Time | External deps | Use when |
    66вҶ’|---|---|---|---|---|
    67вҶ’| Quick | `make test-quick` | ~10-20s | None | During development |
    68вҶ’| Standard | `make test-standard` | ~30-60s | None | Before committing |
    69вҶ’| Full | `make test-full` | ~2-5min | DB + running services | Before merge |
    70вҶ’
    71вҶ’### Core rules
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’- **Always write tests for new additions.** Tests ship with the code, not as a follow-up.
    74вҶ’- **Update existing tests when modifying behaviour.**
    75вҶ’- **Target >= 80% line coverage per package.** Glue/wiring packages (`cmd/server`, `router`) are exempt.
    76вҶ’- **Always run database code against a real database.** Compilation and unit tests alone are not sufficient вҖ” runtime issues like pgx type encoding mismatches only surface with a live connection.
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’---
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’## Issue tracking (Beads)
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’```bash
    83вҶ’bd list                                # all open issues
    84вҶ’bd ready                               # issues with no blockers (ready to work)
    85вҶ’bd show <id>                           # detailed view with dependencies
    86вҶ’bd create --title "..." --description "..."
    87вҶ’bd update <id> --status in_progress
    88вҶ’bd close <id>
    89вҶ’```
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’See `AGENTS.md` for issue type guidance, epic creation, dependencies, and
    92вҶ’completion workflow.
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’---
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’## Common task recipes
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’### Add a config env var
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’1. Add field to `Config` struct in `api/internal/config/config.go` with `env:"VAR_NAME"` tag
   101вҶ’2. Document it in `.env.example`
   102вҶ’3. Access via `cfg.FieldName` (config flows through `router.Deps`)
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’### Add a database query
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’Use pgx directly: `pool.QueryRow(ctx, sql, $1, $2, ...)`. Always pass context.
   107вҶ’Never build SQL with `fmt.Sprintf` вҖ” always use `$N` placeholders.
   108вҶ’
   109вҶ’### Add a Go package
   110вҶ’
   111вҶ’Create `api/internal/<name>/` with `package <name>`. Pass deps explicitly via
   112вҶ’structs; no `init()` globals.
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’---
   115вҶ’
   116вҶ’## Git workflow
   117вҶ’
   118вҶ’When work is complete and verified, merge directly into `main` from the command
   119вҶ’line. Do not create pull requests unless there is an unresolvable merge problem.
   120вҶ’
   121вҶ’See `AGENTS.md` for commit conventions, worktree workflow, and session
   122вҶ’completion protocol.
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’---
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’## Implementation plans
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’After plan mode approval, copy the plan from `~/.claude/plans/` into
   129вҶ’`docs/plans/` with a meaningful name (e.g., `flt-a1b-db-schema.md`).
   130вҶ’Plans in `~/.claude/` are machine-local; the repo copy syncs across devices.
   131вҶ’See `AGENTS.md` for naming conventions and lifecycle.
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’---
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’## Project specs (`docs/specs/`)
   136вҶ’
   137вҶ’Comprehensive product and architecture documentation lives in `docs/specs/`.
   138вҶ’Consult these before making significant changes to understand current behaviour.
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’| File | Covers |
   141вҶ’|---|---|
   142вҶ’| `product-overview.md` | Architecture, data model, API design, auth, MCP, tech choices |
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’---
   145вҶ’
   146вҶ’## What NOT to do
   147вҶ’
   148вҶ’- **Never edit** `graph/generated/generated.go` or `graph/model/models_gen.go` вҖ” run `make api-generate`
   149вҶ’- **Never commit** `.env` вҖ” only `.env.example`
   150вҶ’- **Never use `fmt.Sprintf` to build SQL** вҖ” use parameterized `$N` placeholders
   151вҶ’- **Never hardcode brand colors** вҖ” use Mantine color refs or CSS vars
   152вҶ’- **Never use Tailwind utility classes** вҖ” use Mantine style props or inline styles
   153вҶ’- **Never add** `node_modules/` or `dist/` to git
   154вҶ’
   155вҶ’---
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’## README.md
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’`README.md` is the human-facing project documentation. **Keep it up to date**
   160вҶ’when making changes that affect how someone builds, runs, or configures the
   161вҶ’project.
   162вҶ’
   163вҶ’---
   164вҶ’
   165вҶ’@api/CLAUDE.md
   166вҶ’@web/CLAUDE.md
   167вҶ’

1вҶ’# API вҖ” Claude Instructions
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’Go API server. Module: `github.com/ketang/flotsam/api`. All paths below are
     4вҶ’relative to `api/` unless noted.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’---
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’## Binaries
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’| Binary | Command | Purpose |
    11вҶ’|---|---|---|
    12вҶ’| `flotsamd` | `cmd/flotsamd/` | API server daemon вҖ” HTTP server, GraphQL, MCP. Inserts River jobs but does not process them. |
    13вҶ’| `flotsam-worker` | `cmd/flotsam-worker/` | Job processor вҖ” polls `river_job` table, executes background work (page fetch, transcription, embedding, classification). Non-daemon: runs jobs and exits, or runs continuously with `--watch`. |
    14вҶ’| `flotsam` | `cmd/flotsam/` | CLI client вҖ” capture, search, list, voice record. Cross-platform single binary. |
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’For simple single-machine deployment, `flotsamd --with-worker` forks `flotsam-worker --watch` as a child process.
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’## Startup sequence (`cmd/flotsamd/main.go`)
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’1. Load `.env` via godotenv (no-op if absent вҖ” dev convenience only)
    21вҶ’2. Parse all config from env vars вҶ’ `internal/config.Config`
    22вҶ’3. Set the default `slog` logger (format/level from config)
    23вҶ’4. Connect pgxpool with retry вҶ’ `internal/db.Connect`
    24вҶ’5. Initialize S3 storage client вҶ’ `internal/storage.New`
    25вҶ’6. Initialize River client in insert-only mode (enqueue jobs, don't process)
    26вҶ’7. Choose JWT validator: HMACValidator (HS256) using `JWT_SECRET`
    27вҶ’8. Build chi router with all middleware and routes вҶ’ `internal/router.New`
    28вҶ’9. Optionally fork `flotsam-worker --watch` if `--with-worker` flag is set
    29вҶ’10. Start HTTP server; block on SIGINT/SIGTERM; graceful shutdown
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’---
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’## Package map
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’| Package | Purpose |
    36вҶ’|---|---|
    37вҶ’| `internal/config` | Env var binding via `caarlos0/env` struct tags |
    38вҶ’| `internal/auth` | JWT validation, password hashing (bcrypt) |
    39вҶ’| `internal/db` | pgxpool connection with retry; goose embedded migration runner |
    40вҶ’| `internal/item` | Item CRUD, search (FTS + semantic) |
    41вҶ’| `internal/middleware` | RequestID, Logging (slog), Recovery, Auth, RateLimit |
    42вҶ’| `internal/router` | Chi router wiring вҖ” routes, middleware, GraphQL handler |
    43вҶ’| `internal/mcp` | MCP server + per-client authorization |
    44вҶ’| `internal/provider` | AI provider interfaces (embedding, transcription, classification) |
    45вҶ’| `internal/storage` | S3 client abstraction (MinIO dev / R2 prod) |
    46вҶ’| `internal/worker` | River background job definitions (page fetch, transcription, etc.) |
    47вҶ’| `internal/server` | `http.Server` with production timeouts; `Shutdown` helper |
    48вҶ’| `graph/schema/` | GraphQL SDL files (source of truth) |
    49вҶ’| `graph/generated/` | gqlgen output вҖ” **never edit manually** |
    50вҶ’| `graph/model/` | Generated Go types вҖ” **never edit manually** |
    51вҶ’| `graph/resolver/` | Hand-written resolver implementations |
    52вҶ’| `migrations/` | Goose SQL files + `//go:embed` wrapper (`migrations.go`) |
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’---
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’## Go conventions
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’- **Error wrapping**: `fmt.Errorf("package: context: %w", err)` вҖ” always include package prefix
    59вҶ’- **Logging**: `slog.Error("msg", "key", val, "error", err)` вҖ” structured, never `fmt.Println`
    60вҶ’- **Constructors**: return `(T, error)`; caller decides how to handle; never panic on bad input
    61вҶ’- **Context**: always the first parameter вҖ” `func Foo(ctx context.Context, ...)`
    62вҶ’- **Package names**: single lowercase word matching the directory name
    63вҶ’- **File layout**: exported types first, unexported helpers below
    64вҶ’- **Interfaces**: named by behaviour (`Validator`, not `IValidator`); defined where consumed
    65вҶ’- **Dependencies**: passed explicitly through structs (e.g. `router.Deps`); no `init()` globals
    66вҶ’- **SQL**: always parameterized (`$1`, `$2`); never `fmt.Sprintf` into a query string
    67вҶ’
    68вҶ’---
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’## Authentication (`internal/auth`)
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’`Validator` interface with `HMACValidator` (HS256, `JWT_SECRET`).
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’### Request flow
    75вҶ’
    76вҶ’1. **Auth middleware** (`middleware.Auth`) extracts `Authorization: Bearer <token>`,
    77вҶ’   validates the JWT, and stores `*auth.Claims` in the request context.
    78вҶ’2. Resolvers access the authenticated user via `auth.GetClaims(ctx)`.
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’### Protected routes
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’- `/graphql` вҖ” **OptionalAuth** (anonymous allowed for health; auth required for mutations)
    83вҶ’- `/mcp/*` вҖ” **Auth** (mandatory JWT or API key; 401 if missing/invalid)
    84вҶ’- `/upload` вҖ” **Auth** (mandatory JWT)
    85вҶ’- `/health` вҖ” no auth
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’---
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’## GraphQL (`graph/`, gqlgen вҖ” schema-first)
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’### Workflow for adding a query or type
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’1. Edit or create a `.graphql` file under `graph/schema/`
    94вҶ’2. `make generate` вҖ” regenerates `graph/generated/generated.go` and `graph/model/models_gen.go`
    95вҶ’3. Implement the new resolver method in `graph/resolver/schema.resolvers.go`
    96вҶ’4. Add new deps to the `Resolver` struct in `graph/resolver/resolver.go` and wire them in `router.go`
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’---
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’## Database & migrations
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’- **PostgreSQL 16+** with pgvector
   103вҶ’- **Driver**: `jackc/pgx/v5` + `pgxpool` вҖ” context-aware, async
   104вҶ’- **Migrations**: `pressly/goose/v3` embedded in binary via `migrations/migrations.go`
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’### Creating a migration
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’```bash
   109вҶ’make migrate-create NAME=short_description
   110вҶ’# вҶ’ creates migrations/NNNN_short_description.sql
   111вҶ’```
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’Write the migration using Goose markers:
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’```sql
   116вҶ’-- +goose Up
   117вҶ’ALTER TABLE items ADD COLUMN foo text;
   118вҶ’
   119вҶ’-- +goose Down
   120вҶ’ALTER TABLE items DROP COLUMN foo;
   121вҶ’```
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’Then apply:
   124вҶ’
   125вҶ’```bash
   126вҶ’make migrate-up
   127вҶ’```
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’---
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’## Background jobs (River)
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’PG-backed job queue using [River](https://riverqueue.com). Jobs are defined in
   134вҶ’`internal/worker/` and processed by `flotsam-worker`.
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’**Architecture**: `flotsamd` inserts jobs (River client in insert-only mode).
   137вҶ’`flotsam-worker` processes them (River client with workers registered).
   138вҶ’They share the same PostgreSQL database вҖ” no message broker needed.
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’### Job types
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’| Job | Purpose | Trigger |
   143вҶ’|---|---|---|
   144вҶ’| PageFetch | Fetch + extract readable content from bookmark URLs | Bookmark capture |
   145вҶ’| Transcribe | Transcribe audio via Whisper API or local whisper.cpp | Voice note upload |
   146вҶ’| Embed | Generate vector embedding for item content | Item create/update |
   147вҶ’| Classify | Auto-extract metadata (category, people, topics) via LLM | After content ready |
   148вҶ’| S3Upload | Upload large content to S3 | File/audio upload |
   149вҶ’
   150вҶ’### Running the worker
   151вҶ’
   152вҶ’```bash
   153вҶ’flotsam-worker --watch          # continuous mode: poll for jobs, run until killed
   154вҶ’flotsam-worker --once           # run pending jobs and exit (useful for cron/debugging)
   155вҶ’```
   156вҶ’
   157вҶ’### Adding a job
   158вҶ’
   159вҶ’1. Create `internal/worker/<job_name>.go` with a struct implementing `river.Worker`
   160вҶ’2. Register the worker in `internal/worker/registry.go`
   161вҶ’3. Enqueue from service layer (in `flotsamd`): `riverClient.Insert(ctx, &MyJobArgs{...})`
   162вҶ’
   163вҶ’---
   164вҶ’
   165вҶ’## Provider interfaces (`internal/provider`)
   166вҶ’
   167вҶ’Pluggable AI service interfaces with local fallback for sensitive content:
   168вҶ’
   169вҶ’```go
   170вҶ’type EmbeddingProvider interface {
   171вҶ’    Embed(ctx context.Context, text string) ([]float32, error)
   172вҶ’    EmbedBatch(ctx context.Context, texts []string) ([][]float32, error)
   173вҶ’    Dimensions() int
   174вҶ’}
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’type TranscriptionProvider interface {
   177вҶ’    Transcribe(ctx context.Context, audio io.Reader, opts TranscribeOpts) (string, error)
   178вҶ’}
   179вҶ’
   180вҶ’type ClassificationProvider interface {
   181вҶ’    Classify(ctx context.Context, content string) (*Classification, error)
   182вҶ’}
   183вҶ’```
   184вҶ’
   185вҶ’Routing: if item sensitivity >= `sensitive`, use local providers (Ollama).
   186вҶ’Otherwise, use configured default (OpenAI).
   187вҶ’
   188вҶ’---
   189вҶ’
   190вҶ’## Testing
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’### Rules
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’- **Target >= 80% line coverage per package** via unit tests (`-short`). Document exceptions.
   195вҶ’- **Never touch a real DB in unit tests.** Use `testing.Short()` guards in integration tests.
   196вҶ’- **Write tests alongside code**, not as a follow-up.
   197вҶ’
   198вҶ’### Unit vs integration
   199вҶ’
   200вҶ’- Unit tests: no DB, no network; run via `make test-unit` (`-short`)
   201вҶ’- Integration tests: name prefixed `Integration`; skip when `testing.Short()` is true or `DATABASE_URL` is unset
   202вҶ’- New GraphQL queries require: resolver unit tests **and** an integration test
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’### Per-package expectations
   205вҶ’
   206вҶ’| Package | Unit coverage | Notes |
   207вҶ’|---|---|---|
   208вҶ’| `internal/item` | >= 80% | Core logic |
   209вҶ’| `internal/auth` | >= 80% | |
   210вҶ’| `internal/config` | >= 80% | |
   211вҶ’| `internal/provider` | >= 80% | Test with mocked APIs |
   212вҶ’| `cmd/server`, `internal/router` | exempt | Wiring-only; covered by integration tests |
   213вҶ’

1вҶ’package mcp
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’import (
     4вҶ’	"context"
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’	"github.com/google/uuid"
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/item"
     9вҶ’)
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’// ItemSearcher abstracts the item.Service methods the MCP server needs.
    12вҶ’type ItemSearcher interface {
    13вҶ’	GetByID(ctx context.Context, ownerID, itemID uuid.UUID) (*item.Item, error)
    14вҶ’	Search(ctx context.Context, ownerID uuid.UUID, query string, filter *item.Filter, limit int, threshold float64) (*item.SearchResult, error)
    15вҶ’	SemanticSearch(ctx context.Context, ownerID uuid.UUID, embedding []float32, filter *item.Filter, limit int, threshold float64) (*item.SearchResult, error)
    16вҶ’	CaptureBookmark(ctx context.Context, ownerID uuid.UUID, input item.BookmarkInput) (*item.Item, error)
    17вҶ’	CaptureNote(ctx context.Context, ownerID uuid.UUID, input item.NoteInput) (*item.Item, error)
    18вҶ’}
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’// Embedder generates vector embeddings for search queries.
    21вҶ’type Embedder interface {
    22вҶ’	Embed(ctx context.Context, text string) ([]float32, error)
    23вҶ’	Dimensions() int
    24вҶ’}
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’// Deps holds MCP server dependencies.
    27вҶ’type Deps struct {
    28вҶ’	Items    ItemSearcher
    29вҶ’	Embedder Embedder // nil if embedding not configured
    30вҶ’}
    31вҶ’

1вҶ’package mcp
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’import (
     4вҶ’	"context"
     5вҶ’	"net/http"
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’	mcpgo "github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go/mcp"
     8вҶ’	"github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go/server"
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/auth"
    11вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/version"
    12вҶ’)
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’// NewHandler creates an MCP HTTP handler with search, browse, and capture tools.
    15вҶ’func NewHandler(deps Deps) http.Handler {
    16вҶ’	s := server.NewMCPServer(
    17вҶ’		"flotsam",
    18вҶ’		version.Version,
    19вҶ’		server.WithToolCapabilities(false),
    20вҶ’	)
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’	s.AddTool(searchTool(), searchHandler(deps))
    23вҶ’	s.AddTool(browseTool(), browseHandler(deps))
    24вҶ’	s.AddTool(captureTool(), captureHandler(deps))
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’	httpServer := server.NewStreamableHTTPServer(s,
    27вҶ’		server.WithStateLess(true),
    28вҶ’		server.WithHTTPContextFunc(func(ctx context.Context, r *http.Request) context.Context {
    29вҶ’			if claims := auth.GetClaims(r.Context()); claims != nil {
    30вҶ’				ctx = auth.WithClaims(ctx, claims)
    31вҶ’			}
    32вҶ’			return ctx
    33вҶ’		}),
    34вҶ’	)
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’	return httpServer
    37вҶ’}
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’// requireAuth extracts claims from context, returning an error result if unauthenticated.
    40вҶ’func requireAuth(ctx context.Context) (*auth.Claims, *mcpgo.CallToolResult) {
    41вҶ’	claims := auth.GetClaims(ctx)
    42вҶ’	if claims == nil {
    43вҶ’		return nil, mcpgo.NewToolResultError("authentication required")
    44вҶ’	}
    45вҶ’	return claims, nil
    46вҶ’}

     3вҶ’import (

    17вҶ’	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"

    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/graph/generated"
    21вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/graph/resolver"
    22вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/auth"
    23вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/config"
    24вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/item"
    25вҶ’	flotsammcp "github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/mcp"

    29вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/user"
    30вҶ’	"github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/version"
    31вҶ’)
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’// Deps holds the dependencies needed to construct the router.
    34вҶ’type Deps struct {
    35вҶ’	Config      *config.Config
    36вҶ’	Pool        *pgxpool.Pool
    37вҶ’	Validator   auth.Validator
    38вҶ’	Storage     *storage.Client // nil if S3 not configured
    39вҶ’	RiverClient *river.Client[pgx.Tx]
    40вҶ’	Items       *item.Service
    41вҶ’	Users       *user.Service
    42вҶ’	Issuer      *auth.Issuer
    43вҶ’	Embedder    provider.Embedder // nil if no embedding provider configured
    44вҶ’}
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’// New constructs the chi router with all middleware, routes, and handlers.
    47вҶ’func New(deps Deps) http.Handler {
    48вҶ’	r := chi.NewRouter()
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’	// Global middleware (applied to every request)
    51вҶ’	r.Use(flotsammiddleware.RequestID)
    52вҶ’	r.Use(flotsammiddleware.Logging)
    53вҶ’	r.Use(flotsammiddleware.Recovery)
    54вҶ’	r.Use(chimiddleware.RealIP)
    55вҶ’	r.Use(chimiddleware.StripSlashes)
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’	// CORS (if configured)
    58вҶ’	if deps.Config.CORSOrigins != "" {
    59вҶ’		origins := parseCORSOrigins(deps.Config.CORSOrigins)
    60вҶ’		r.Use(cors.Handler(cors.Options{
    61вҶ’			AllowedOrigins:   origins,
    62вҶ’			AllowedMethods:   []string{"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"},
    63вҶ’			AllowedHeaders:   []string{"Accept", "Authorization", "Content-Type"},
    64вҶ’			AllowCredentials: true,
    65вҶ’			MaxAge:           300,
    66вҶ’		}))
    67вҶ’	}
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’	// Health endpoint вҖ” no auth
    70вҶ’	r.Get("/health", healthHandler)
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’	// GraphQL handler
    73вҶ’	gqlSrv := handler.New(generated.NewExecutableSchema(generated.Config{
    74вҶ’		Resolvers: &resolver.Resolver{
    75вҶ’			ItemService: deps.Items,
    76вҶ’			UserService: deps.Users,
    77вҶ’			Issuer:      deps.Issuer,
    78вҶ’			RiverClient: deps.RiverClient,
    79вҶ’			Storage:     deps.Storage,
    80вҶ’			Embedder:    deps.Embedder,
    81вҶ’		},
    82вҶ’	}))
    83вҶ’	gqlSrv.AddTransport(transport.POST{})
    84вҶ’	gqlSrv.AddTransport(transport.GET{})
    85вҶ’	if deps.Config.GQLIntrospection {
    86вҶ’		gqlSrv.Use(extension.Introspection{})
    87вҶ’	}
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’	// GraphQL endpoint вҖ” optional auth + rate limit
    90вҶ’	r.Route("/graphql", func(r chi.Router) {
    91вҶ’		r.Use(flotsammiddleware.OptionalAuth(deps.Validator))
    92вҶ’		if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
    93вҶ’			rl := flotsammiddleware.NewRateLimiter(deps.Config.RateLimitGraphQL)
    94вҶ’			r.Use(rl.Limit)
    95вҶ’		}
    96вҶ’		r.Post("/", gqlSrv.ServeHTTP)
    97вҶ’		r.Get("/", gqlSrv.ServeHTTP)
    98вҶ’	})
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’	// GraphQL playground (dev only)
   101вҶ’	if deps.Config.GQLPlayground {
   102вҶ’		r.Get("/playground", playground.Handler("Flotsam API", "/graphql"))
   103вҶ’		slog.Info("router: GraphQL playground enabled at /playground")
   104вҶ’	}
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’	// MCP endpoint вҖ” mandatory auth + rate limit
   107вҶ’	if deps.Config.MCPEnabled {
   108вҶ’		r.Route("/mcp", func(r chi.Router) {
   109вҶ’			r.Use(flotsammiddleware.Auth(deps.Validator))
   110вҶ’			if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
   111вҶ’				rl := flotsammiddleware.NewRateLimiter(deps.Config.RateLimitMCP)
   112вҶ’				r.Use(rl.Limit)
   113вҶ’			}
   114вҶ’			mcpHandler := flotsammcp.NewHandler(flotsammcp.Deps{
   115вҶ’			Items:    deps.Items,
   116вҶ’			Embedder: deps.Embedder,
   117вҶ’		})
   118вҶ’		r.Handle("/*", mcpHandler)
   119вҶ’		})
   120вҶ’		slog.Info("router: MCP endpoint enabled at /mcp")
   121вҶ’	}
   122вҶ’
   123вҶ’	// Upload endpoint вҖ” mandatory auth
   124вҶ’	r.Route("/upload", func(r chi.Router) {
   125вҶ’		r.Use(flotsammiddleware.Auth(deps.Validator))
   126вҶ’		r.Post("/", uploadHandler(deps.Storage, deps.Config.MaxUploadSize))
   127вҶ’	})
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’	slog.Info("router: initialized",
   130вҶ’		"cors_origins", deps.Config.CORSOrigins,
   131вҶ’		"mcp_enabled", deps.Config.MCPEnabled,
   132вҶ’		"rate_limit_enabled", deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled,
   133вҶ’	)
   134вҶ’
   135вҶ’	return r
   136вҶ’}
   137вҶ’
   138вҶ’func healthHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {
   139вҶ’	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
   140вҶ’	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{
   141вҶ’		"status":  "ok",
   142вҶ’		"version": version.Version,
   143вҶ’	})
   144вҶ’}
   145вҶ’
   146вҶ’func parseCORSOrigins(s string) []string {
   147вҶ’	parts := strings.Split(s, ",")
   148вҶ’	origins := make([]string, 0, len(parts))
   149вҶ’	for _, p := range parts {
   150вҶ’		p = strings.TrimSpace(p)
   151вҶ’		if p != "" {
   152вҶ’			origins = append(origins, p)
   153вҶ’		}
   154вҶ’	}
   155вҶ’	return origins
   156вҶ’}

1вҶ’# flt-it8.13: MCP Server вҖ” search + browse + capture
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## Context
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’The Flotsam API needs an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server so AI assistants can search, browse, and capture items in the knowledge base. The router already has a `/mcp` route group with auth middleware and rate limiting, but it serves a 501 placeholder. The `api/internal/mcp/` package doesn't exist yet.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’## Approach
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’Use `github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go` (latest v0.45.0) with Streamable HTTP transport. Define local interfaces for dependencies (per project convention: "interfaces defined where consumed"). Three tools: search, browse, capture.
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’## Files to Create
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’### 1. `api/internal/mcp/mcp.go` вҖ” Interfaces + Deps
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’- `ItemSearcher` interface (subset of `item.Service` methods needed)
    16вҶ’- `Embedder` interface (mirrors `provider.Embedder`)
    17вҶ’- `Deps` struct holding `Items ItemSearcher` and `Embedder Embedder` (nil-able)
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’### 2. `api/internal/mcp/server.go` вҖ” NewHandler constructor
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’- `NewHandler(deps Deps) http.Handler`
    22вҶ’- Creates `server.NewMCPServer("flotsam", version, ...)` with tool capabilities
    23вҶ’- Registers three tools via `s.AddTool()`
    24вҶ’- Returns `server.NewStreamableHTTPServer(s, ...)` with:
    25вҶ’  - Stateless mode (auth is per-request via chi middleware)
    26вҶ’  - `WithHTTPContextFunc` to forward auth claims from `r.Context()` into MCP handler context
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’### 3. `api/internal/mcp/tools.go` вҖ” Tool definitions + handlers
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’**search tool**: `query` (required string), `limit` (optional int 1-50, default 10), `type` (optional enum filter)
    31вҶ’- If embedder available: embed query вҶ’ `SemanticSearch`, fall back to FTS on failure or empty results
    32вҶ’- If no embedder: straight to `Search` (FTS)
    33вҶ’- Returns formatted markdown text with item summaries
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’**browse tool**: `id` (required UUID string)
    36вҶ’- Calls `GetByID` with authenticated user's owner ID
    37вҶ’- Returns full item details as markdown
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’**capture tool**: `url` (optional), `content` (optional), `title` (optional), `tags` (optional comma-separated), `sensitivity` (optional enum)
    40вҶ’- URL provided вҶ’ `CaptureBookmark` with source "mcp"
    41вҶ’- Content provided вҶ’ `CaptureNote` with source "mcp"
    42вҶ’- Neither вҶ’ error
    43вҶ’- Returns captured item as markdown
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’All handlers: extract claims via `auth.GetClaims(ctx)`, return tool error if nil.
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’### 4. `api/internal/mcp/format.go` вҖ” Output formatting
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’- `formatSearchResults(*item.SearchResult) string` вҖ” markdown list of items (title, type, tags, snippet)
    50вҶ’- `formatItem(*item.Item) string` вҖ” full item detail as markdown
    51вҶ’- `formatItemSummary(*item.Item) string` вҖ” one-line summary for search results
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’### 5. `api/internal/mcp/tools_test.go` вҖ” Unit tests (>=80% coverage)
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’Mock `ItemSearcher` and `Embedder` with function-field structs. Test each handler directly by constructing `mcp.CallToolRequest` and injecting auth claims via `auth.WithClaims(ctx, claims)`.
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’Key test cases:
    58вҶ’- search: semantic search path, FTS fallback (embedder nil), FTS fallback (embed error), FTS fallback (semantic empty), type filter, limit clamping, no auth
    59вҶ’- browse: found, not found, invalid UUID, no auth
    60вҶ’- capture: bookmark (url), note (content), missing input, with tags, no auth
    61вҶ’- format helpers: search results, full item
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’## File to Modify
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’### 6. `api/internal/router/router.go`
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’- Add import: `flotsammcp "github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/mcp"`
    68вҶ’- Replace `r.Handle("/*", placeholderHandler("mcp"))` with:
    69вҶ’  ```go
    70вҶ’  mcpHandler := flotsammcp.NewHandler(flotsammcp.Deps{
    71вҶ’      Items:    deps.Items,
    72вҶ’      Embedder: deps.Embedder,
    73вҶ’  })
    74вҶ’  r.Handle("/*", mcpHandler)
    75вҶ’  ```
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’## Key Design Decisions
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’1. **Stateless MCP**: No server-side sessions. Auth is per-request (JWT via chi middleware). Simplifies deployment.
    80вҶ’2. **Context bridging**: `WithHTTPContextFunc` copies auth claims from HTTP request context into MCP tool handler context. Same pattern as GraphQL resolvers.
    81вҶ’3. **Semantic-first search**: Try embedding + vector search first, fall back to FTS. Graceful degradation when embedder is nil.
    82вҶ’4. **Text output**: MCP tool results are markdown text (not JSON). More readable for AI consumers.
    83вҶ’5. **Chi path stripping**: Chi's `r.Route("/mcp", ...)` strips the prefix. May need `server.WithEndpointPath("/")` on the StreamableHTTPServer to align. Will verify during implementation.
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’## Dependencies
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’```bash
    88вҶ’cd api && go get github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go@latest
    89вҶ’```
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’## Verification
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’```bash
    94вҶ’# Unit tests with coverage
    95вҶ’cd api && go test -short -race -count=1 -cover ./internal/mcp/...
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’# Full quality gate
    98вҶ’cd api && go vet ./... && golangci-lint run ./...
    99вҶ’make api-test-unit && make api-lint
   100вҶ’```

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a complete picture. Let me provide the report:

## MCP Endpoint Implementation Report

### Files in the MCP Package

Located at `/home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/mcp-align/api/internal/mcp/`:

1. **mcp.go** - Interface and dependency definitions
2. **server.go** - HTTP handler factory and authentication enforcement
3. **tools.go** - Tool definitions and handlers (search, browse, capture)
4. **format.go** - Output formatting for tool results
5. **tools_test.go** - Comprehensive unit tests

### What the /mcp Endpoint Actually Does

This is a **full, production-ready implementation** вҖ” not a placeholder. The MCP server is completely functional:

- **Location**: Registered at `/mcp/*` in `api/internal/router/router.go` (lines 107-121)
- **Authentication**: Mandatory JWT auth via middleware, with per-request claims extraction
- **Rate limiting**: Configurable via `RateLimitMCP` env var (default 120 req/min)
- **Feature gate**: Controlled by `MCPEnabled` env var (default true)

### Route Registration Details

From `router.go` (lines 107-121):

```go
r.Route("/mcp", func(r chi.Router) {
    r.Use(flotsammiddleware.Auth(deps.Validator))        // Mandatory JWT
    if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
        rl := flotsammiddleware.NewRateLimiter(deps.Config.RateLimitMCP)
        r.Use(rl.Limit)
    }
    mcpHandler := flotsammcp.NewHandler(flotsammcp.Deps{
        Items:    deps.Items,
        Embedder: deps.Embedder,
    })
    r.Handle("/*", mcpHandler)  // Delegates to MCP-Go server
})
```

The handler uses `mark3labs/mcp-go` library's `StreamableHTTPServer` which implements the MCP protocol over HTTP.

### MCP Tools/Resources Defined

The MCP server exposes **three tools** (from `tools.go`):

#### 1. **search** tool
- Searches knowledge base with full-text or semantic search
- Parameters:
  - `query` (required): Search text
  - `limit` (optional, 1-50, default 10): Max results
  - `type` (optional): Filter by item type (bookmark, text_note, voice_note)
- Behavior: Tries semantic search first (if embedder available), falls back to FTS
- Output: Markdown-formatted results with titles, types, tags, snippets

#### 2. **browse** tool
- Retrieves full content of an item by UUID
- Parameters:
  - `id` (required): Item UUID
- Output: Markdown-formatted full item including title, metadata, content, tags, URL, etc.

#### 3. **capture** tool
- Creates new items in knowledge base
- Parameters:
  - `url` (optional): For bookmarks
  - `content` (optional): For text notes
  - `title` (optional)
  - `tags` (optional): Comma-separated
  - `sensitivity` (optional): "normal" or "sensitive"
- Behavior: Creates bookmark if URL provided, text note if content provided; sets `source: "mcp"`
- Output: Formatted item with all metadata

### Authentication Model

- Extracts `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header via `auth.GetClaims()`
- Enforces authentication per-tool via `requireAuth()` helper in `server.go`
- Returns error result if claims are missing (no unauthenticated access)
- User isolation via `claims.UserID` вҖ” each user only sees/creates their own items

### Test Coverage

`tools_test.go` (18.5 KB) includes comprehensive tests:
- **Search tests**: semantic vs FTS fallback, embedding errors, type filtering, limit clamping, empty queries, auth requirements
- **Browse tests**: found/not-found cases, invalid UUID, auth
- **Capture tests**: bookmark and note creation, tags parsing, sensitivity levels, auth
- **Format tests**: empty results, multi-item lists, pagination indicators, content truncation

Test coverage includes mocks for `ItemSearcher` and `Embedder` interfaces, ensuring isolation from dependencies.

### Key Dependencies (from mcp.go)

```go
type ItemSearcher interface {
    GetByID(ctx, ownerID, itemID)
    Search(ctx, ownerID, query, filter, limit, threshold)
    SemanticSearch(ctx, ownerID, embedding, filter, limit, threshold)
    CaptureBookmark(ctx, ownerID, input)
    CaptureNote(ctx, ownerID, input)
}

type Embedder interface {
    Embed(ctx, text) ([]float32, error)
    Dimensions() int
}
```

### Next Steps (Task Context)

Task #17 `flt-it8.14` is pending and blocked by #14 (`flt-it8.27: MCP feature/docs alignment`). The next phase will add:
- Per-client API keys
- Tool permission allowlists
- Sensitivity-level filtering
- Human-in-the-loop approval
- Audit logging

**Bottom line**: The MCP implementation is live and functional, providing semantic/FTS search, item browsing, and capture via three well-tested tools with mandatory JWT authentication and rate limiting.

Perfect. Now let me compile my findings into a comprehensive report.

## Summary of MCP References in Documentation

I've completed a thorough search of all documentation in `/home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/mcp-align`. Here are all MCP references found:

---

### 1. **README.md** вҖ” Lines 4, 11-12, 18, 21

**MCP presented as:** Currently available (integrated into architecture)

Exact quotes:
- Line 4: "with semantic search and AI integration via MCP"
- Lines 11-12: "**AI integration**: MCP server lets AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) access your personal knowledge base with defense-in-depth authorization"
- Line 18: "Clients (Chrome Extension, Android App, Web App, AI Tools via MCP)"
- Line 21: "Go API Server (GraphQL + REST upload + MCP)"

---

### 2. **CLAUDE.md (Root)** вҖ” Lines 29

**MCP presented as:** Infrastructure requirement

Exact quote:
- Line 29: "- **Web dev server**: `:8080` вҖ” proxies `/graphql`, `/api`, and `/mcp` вҶ’ `localhost:8081`"

---

### 3. **api/CLAUDE.md** вҖ” Lines 12, 43, 83

**MCP presented as:** Currently implemented (wired into API architecture)

Exact quotes:
- Line 12: "| `flotsamd` | `cmd/flotsamd/` | API server daemon вҖ” HTTP server, GraphQL, MCP. Inserts River jobs but does not process them. |"
- Line 43: "| `internal/mcp` | MCP server + per-client authorization |"
- Line 83: "| `/mcp/*` вҖ” **Auth** (mandatory JWT or API key; 401 if missing/invalid) |"

---

### 4. **docs/specs/product-overview.md** вҖ” Lines 5, 16, 28-29, 35, 43, 81, 196-229 (3 tables), 310, 321, 345-373, 481

**MCP presented as:** Core architectural feature with comprehensive authorization model

Key exact quotes:
- Line 5: "with semantic search and AI integration via MCP"
- Line 16: "Full vision (post-MVP): ... MCP with defense-in-depth authorization"
- Lines 28-29: "в”Ӯ AI Tools в”Ӯ\nв”Ӯ(via MCP) в”Ӯ"
- Line 35: "в”Ӯ  MCP Server   в”Ӯ"
- Line 36: "в”Ӯ  (go-sdk)     в”Ӯ"
- Line 43: "в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  MCP AuthZ  в”Ӯ"
- Section 5 (Lines 321-342): "MCP clients: Per-client API keys (registered in web UI)"
- **Section 6 (Lines 345-373): Complete "MCP Authorization Model"** with three defense-in-depth layers:
  - Layer 1: Per-client tool permissions
  - Layer 2: Human-in-the-loop approval (real-time user approval for sensitive ops)
  - Layer 3: Content-level filtering (sensitivity-based filtering)
- **Table: MCP client registry** (Lines 196-211): DB schema for `mcp_clients` table with permissions, API key management, approval requirements
- **Table: Audit log** (Lines 214-228): DB schema for `audit_log` table tracking MCP access for accountability
- Line 310: "| * | `/mcp` | MCP streamable HTTP |"
- Line 481: "| MCP | modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk | Official Go MCP SDK |"

---

### 5. **docs/plans/flt-it8.13-mcp-server.md** вҖ” Full file

**MCP presented as:** In development (active implementation plan)

This is the most detailed MCP specification. Key sections:
- **Context** (Lines 3-5): "The Flotsam API needs an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server so AI assistants can search, browse, and capture items in the knowledge base. The router already has a `/mcp` route group with auth middleware and rate limiting, but it serves a 501 placeholder. The `api/internal/mcp/` package doesn't exist yet."
- **Approach** (Lines 7-9): Uses official `modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk` (v0.45.0) with Streamable HTTP transport
- **Three tools defined:**
  1. **search tool** (Lines 30-33): Query, limit, type filter; semantic search with FTS fallback
  2. **browse tool** (Lines 35-37): Item retrieval by ID
  3. **capture tool** (Lines 39-43): Bookmark/note capture via MCP
- **Key Design Decisions** (Lines 77-83): Stateless MCP, context bridging, semantic-first search, markdown output, chi path handling
- **Implementation scope**: 5 new files in `internal/mcp/`, 1 router modification

---

### 6. **docs/plans/flt-it8.2-api-scaffold.md** вҖ” Lines 16, 104-105

**MCP presented as:** Planned (configuration flag, not yet implemented)

Exact quotes:
- Line 16: "Fields: ... MCPEnabled, RateLimitEnabled + 3 limit ints, ShutdownTimeout"
- Lines 104-105: "`/mcp/*` вҶ’ 501 placeholder + Auth + rate limit (if MCPEnabled)"

---

### 7. **docs/plans/flt-it8.15-web-scaffold.md** вҖ” Lines 22

**MCP presented as:** Explicitly NOT in scope for web frontend

Exact quote:
- Line 22: "**No MCP web client** (no webmcp.js)"

---

## Key Findings

| Reference | Status | Context |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| README.md | Available | Product feature in user-facing docs |
| CLAUDE.md (root) | Available | Proxy config for local dev |
| api/CLAUDE.md | Implemented | Binary description + router auth |
| docs/specs/product-overview.md | Comprehensive Design | Complete auth model, DB schema, SDK choice |
| docs/plans/flt-it8.13-mcp-server.md | In Development | Active implementation plan (3 tools: search/browse/capture) |
| docs/plans/flt-it8.2-api-scaffold.md | Planned/Stub | Config flag `MCPEnabled`, 501 placeholder routes |
| docs/plans/flt-it8.15-web-scaffold.md | Out of Scope | Explicitly NOT including MCP web client |

**Overall MCP Status**: The project treats MCP as a core first-class feature. The complete authorization model (including sensitive content filtering, human-in-the-loop approval, and audit logging) is designed. Implementation is in-progress with an active plan document for the MCP server handler package.

Good news вҖ” the MCP implementation is **fully functional**, not a placeholder. The exploration reveals:

**Reality**: The `api/internal/mcp/` package has a complete implementation with 3 tools (search, browse, capture), JWT auth, rate limiting, and comprehensive tests. It uses `mark3labs/mcp-go` StreamableHTTPServer.

**Docs issue**: The implementation plan (`docs/plans/flt-it8.13-mcp-server.md`) still says the endpoint "serves a 501 placeholder" and the package "doesn't exist yet" вҖ” but both are outdated since the MCP server has been built.

**What docs claim vs reality**:
- README.md вҶ’ claims MCP is available вҶ’ **accurate**
- api/CLAUDE.md вҶ’ claims MCP is implemented with auth вҶ’ **accurate**  
- product-overview.md вҶ’ describes full MCP auth model (per-client keys, HITL approval, audit logging) вҶ’ **partially inaccurate** вҖ” the advanced auth layers (per-client API keys, HITL, audit log) are NOT yet implemented (those are flt-it8.14)
- The plan doc says "501 placeholder" вҶ’ **stale/inaccurate**

The real fix is minor: update the stale plan doc and ensure product-overview.md clearly distinguishes what's implemented now (basic MCP with JWT auth + 3 tools) from what's planned (per-client keys, HITL, audit logging).

Let me write the plan.

## Context
Project docs and README present MCP as available, while the implementation plan still describes a 501 placeholder. In reality, MCP is fully implemented with 3 tools, JWT auth, and rate limiting. The issue is stale docs, not missing code. The product-overview.md also describes advanced MCP auth features (per-client keys, HITL approval, audit logging) without clearly marking them as planned/future.

- The context section says "serves a 501 placeholder" and "package doesn't exist yet" вҖ” add a note that this plan has been implemented

### 2. Update `docs/specs/product-overview.md` вҖ” clarify MCP implementation status
- In the MCP Authorization Model section (lines ~345-373), clearly mark which layers are implemented vs planned:
  - **Implemented**: JWT auth (mandatory), rate limiting, 3 tools (search/browse/capture)
  - **Planned (flt-it8.14)**: Per-client API keys, tool permission allowlists, HITL approval, sensitivity filtering, audit logging
- Ensure the MCP client registry table and audit log table are marked as planned schema

### 3. Update `api/CLAUDE.md` вҖ” minor clarification
- Line 83 says "mandatory JWT or API key" for /mcp/* вҖ” API key auth is NOT yet implemented. Fix to say "mandatory JWT" only.

### 4. README.md вҖ” minor clarification
- Line 11-12 mentions "defense-in-depth authorization" вҖ” this is aspirational. Soften to reflect current state (JWT auth) while noting the planned model.

## Files to modify
- `docs/plans/flt-it8.13-mcp-server.md` вҖ” add completion status
- `docs/specs/product-overview.md` вҖ” annotate MCP sections with implemented vs planned
- `api/CLAUDE.md` вҖ” fix "/mcp/* Auth" description (remove "API key" claim)
- `README.md` вҖ” adjust MCP description accuracy

## Verification
- `make api-test-unit` вҖ” ensure no code changes break anything
- `make api-lint` вҖ” clean lint
- Review each doc change for accuracy against actual code in `api/internal/mcp/`

1вҶ’# flt-it8.13: MCP Server вҖ” search + browse + capture
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’## Context
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’The Flotsam API needs an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server so AI assistants can search, browse, and capture items in the knowledge base. The router already has a `/mcp` route group with auth middleware and rate limiting, but it serves a 501 placeholder. The `api/internal/mcp/` package doesn't exist yet.
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’## Approach
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’Use `github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go` (latest v0.45.0) with Streamable HTTP transport. Define local interfaces for dependencies (per project convention: "interfaces defined where consumed"). Three tools: search, browse, capture.
    10вҶ’
    11вҶ’## Files to Create
    12вҶ’
    13вҶ’### 1. `api/internal/mcp/mcp.go` вҖ” Interfaces + Deps
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’- `ItemSearcher` interface (subset of `item.Service` methods needed)
    16вҶ’- `Embedder` interface (mirrors `provider.Embedder`)
    17вҶ’- `Deps` struct holding `Items ItemSearcher` and `Embedder Embedder` (nil-able)
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’### 2. `api/internal/mcp/server.go` вҖ” NewHandler constructor
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’- `NewHandler(deps Deps) http.Handler`
    22вҶ’- Creates `server.NewMCPServer("flotsam", version, ...)` with tool capabilities
    23вҶ’- Registers three tools via `s.AddTool()`
    24вҶ’- Returns `server.NewStreamableHTTPServer(s, ...)` with:
    25вҶ’  - Stateless mode (auth is per-request via chi middleware)
    26вҶ’  - `WithHTTPContextFunc` to forward auth claims from `r.Context()` into MCP handler context
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’### 3. `api/internal/mcp/tools.go` вҖ” Tool definitions + handlers
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’**search tool**: `query` (required string), `limit` (optional int 1-50, default 10), `type` (optional enum filter)
    31вҶ’- If embedder available: embed query вҶ’ `SemanticSearch`, fall back to FTS on failure or empty results
    32вҶ’- If no embedder: straight to `Search` (FTS)
    33вҶ’- Returns formatted markdown text with item summaries
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’**browse tool**: `id` (required UUID string)
    36вҶ’- Calls `GetByID` with authenticated user's owner ID
    37вҶ’- Returns full item details as markdown
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’**capture tool**: `url` (optional), `content` (optional), `title` (optional), `tags` (optional comma-separated), `sensitivity` (optional enum)
    40вҶ’- URL provided вҶ’ `CaptureBookmark` with source "mcp"
    41вҶ’- Content provided вҶ’ `CaptureNote` with source "mcp"
    42вҶ’- Neither вҶ’ error
    43вҶ’- Returns captured item as markdown
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’All handlers: extract claims via `auth.GetClaims(ctx)`, return tool error if nil.
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’### 4. `api/internal/mcp/format.go` вҖ” Output formatting
    48вҶ’
    49вҶ’- `formatSearchResults(*item.SearchResult) string` вҖ” markdown list of items (title, type, tags, snippet)
    50вҶ’- `formatItem(*item.Item) string` вҖ” full item detail as markdown
    51вҶ’- `formatItemSummary(*item.Item) string` вҖ” one-line summary for search results
    52вҶ’
    53вҶ’### 5. `api/internal/mcp/tools_test.go` вҖ” Unit tests (>=80% coverage)
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’Mock `ItemSearcher` and `Embedder` with function-field structs. Test each handler directly by constructing `mcp.CallToolRequest` and injecting auth claims via `auth.WithClaims(ctx, claims)`.
    56вҶ’
    57вҶ’Key test cases:
    58вҶ’- search: semantic search path, FTS fallback (embedder nil), FTS fallback (embed error), FTS fallback (semantic empty), type filter, limit clamping, no auth
    59вҶ’- browse: found, not found, invalid UUID, no auth
    60вҶ’- capture: bookmark (url), note (content), missing input, with tags, no auth
    61вҶ’- format helpers: search results, full item
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’## File to Modify
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’### 6. `api/internal/router/router.go`
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’- Add import: `flotsammcp "github.com/ketang/flotsam/api/internal/mcp"`
    68вҶ’- Replace `r.Handle("/*", placeholderHandler("mcp"))` with:
    69вҶ’  ```go
    70вҶ’  mcpHandler := flotsammcp.NewHandler(flotsammcp.Deps{
    71вҶ’      Items:    deps.Items,
    72вҶ’      Embedder: deps.Embedder,
    73вҶ’  })
    74вҶ’  r.Handle("/*", mcpHandler)
    75вҶ’  ```
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’## Key Design Decisions
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’1. **Stateless MCP**: No server-side sessions. Auth is per-request (JWT via chi middleware). Simplifies deployment.
    80вҶ’2. **Context bridging**: `WithHTTPContextFunc` copies auth claims from HTTP request context into MCP tool handler context. Same pattern as GraphQL resolvers.
    81вҶ’3. **Semantic-first search**: Try embedding + vector search first, fall back to FTS. Graceful degradation when embedder is nil.
    82вҶ’4. **Text output**: MCP tool results are markdown text (not JSON). More readable for AI consumers.
    83вҶ’5. **Chi path stripping**: Chi's `r.Route("/mcp", ...)` strips the prefix. May need `server.WithEndpointPath("/")` on the StreamableHTTPServer to align. Will verify during implementation.
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’## Dependencies
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’```bash
    88вҶ’cd api && go get github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go@latest
    89вҶ’```
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’## Verification
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’```bash
    94вҶ’# Unit tests with coverage
    95вҶ’cd api && go test -short -race -count=1 -cover ./internal/mcp/...
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’# Full quality gate
    98вҶ’cd api && go vet ./... && golangci-lint run ./...
    99вҶ’make api-test-unit && make api-lint
   100вҶ’```
   101вҶ’
